Application

Multi-Client Theme System

A production-ready white-labeling solution built with semantic design tokens. Switch between client brands and see how components automatically adapt.

Azure Professional

Classic blue professional theme

Current theme: client-a-light

Theme Controls

Azure Professional
Light mode

Available Client Brands

Button Variants

Azure Professional - Light Mode

Primary Actions

Secondary Actions

Danger Actions

Utility Actions

Interactive States

Framer → Code Translation: These variants work exactly like Framer's component variants. The semantic tokens automatically adapt to different client themes while maintaining consistent behavior patterns.

Database-Driven Button Variants

🔴
Project Alpha
Priority: high
🟡
Project Beta
Priority: medium
🟢
Project Gamma
Priority: low
🟡
Project Delta
Priority: medium

Dynamic Variants: Button variants are determined by database values. Status "active" → primary variant, "pending" → secondary, etc. This mirrors how you'd handle dynamic content in Framer with component properties.

Status Cards with Semantic Tokens

Success

Operation completed

Warning

Requires attention

Info

Additional details

Featured

Premium content

Responsive Design Tokens

Desktop
Full layout with all variants
Mobile
Optimized for touch
Consistent
Same tokens across devices

Implementation Example

const
buttonVariants = cva(
"base styles",
{
variants: {
variant: {
primary: "bg-interactive-primary...",
secondary: "bg-interactive-secondary..."
}
}
}
)

This CVA pattern mirrors Framer's component variants while using semantic tokens that automatically adapt to any client theme.

System Benefits

Zero Refactoring
Add new client themes without changing any component code
Type Safe
Full TypeScript support for all theme variants and client brands
Designer Friendly
Uses the same mental model as Framer component variants
Scalable
Add unlimited clients with just CSS variable definitions
